generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab# .
@prefix base: http://example.org/base# .

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service deployment and isolation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing and querying crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time crane performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition"
]

instance TMC4671MotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller hardware for precise stepper motor control"
]

instance CraneSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted from physical sensors to virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance TimescaleDBTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operations stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 CAD model of the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed around the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal movement of the gantry crane cart"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical movement of the gantry crane hoist"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling and pickup"
]

instance ValidationBreachNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notification of validation breaches enabling operator decisions"
]

instance GenerateOptimalTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Storing historical crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane performance metrics"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory testing"
]

instance MessageTransmissionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmitting data between physical and virtual components via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storing and managing time-series data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for visualization and operator notifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating optimal crane trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateOptimalTrajectory
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for testing trajectories through simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated vs actual trajectories with threshold-based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachNotification
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling MQTT message transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageTransmissionAction
]

instance LabGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane environment"
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, ArduinoController, TMC4671MotorController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service sent to physical crane via Control Application and Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane with motors, sensors, and controllers; physical interface and control applications; digital twin services interconnected via MQTT and database for data flow and service orchestration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as operated (real-time data logging and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectories; alerts when exceeding threshold for system health."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; TimescaleDB for time-series data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python gantrylib module for other components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering; ad-hoc approach without specific digital twin standards."
]
